### Props

| Name               | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                    |
| ------------------ | --------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `schemaItem`       | `object`  | ✓        | —       | The full schema item — mutated directly        |
| `loading`          | `boolean` |          | `false` | Disable state                                  |
| `availableSchemas` | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Available schemas for composition selects      |
| `propertyOptions`  | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Property names for field mapping selects       |
| `allOfSchemaNames` | `array`   |          | `[]`    | Pre-computed names for allOf note card display |
